tif

Class DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD

  • java.lang.Object
    • tif.DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD
  • Enclosing class:
    DirectoryIFD

    public static final class DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a single metadata entry within an Image File Directory.

    Each EntryIFD acts as a bridge between the raw TIFF field structure and Java objects. It encapsulates the tag identity, field type, value count, and the resulting parsed data (such as a String, Integer, or RationalNumber).

    Instances of this class are immutable. Internal byte arrays are defensively copied to maintain data integrity.

      private TifFieldType fieldType

      private byte[] value  
      private long valueOffset

        private final TifFieldType fieldType

    • Constructor Detail

      • EntryIFD

        public EntryIFD(Taggable tag,
                TifFieldType ttype,
                long length,
                long offset,
                byte[] bytes,
                java.nio.ByteOrder order)
        Constructs an immutable EntryIFD instance from raw bytes.
        Parameters:
        tag - the tag descriptor (Taggable enum)
        ttype - the TIFF field type
        length - the number of values (count)
        offset - the raw offset or immediate value field
        bytes - the raw value bytes; the constructor performs a defensive copy
        order - the byte order used to parse the bytes

    • Method Detail

      • getTag

        public Taggable getTag()
        Returns:
        the tag enum that identifies this entry

      • getTagID

        public int getTagID()
        Returns:
        the numeric ID of the tag

      • getFieldType

        public TifFieldType getFieldType()
        Returns:
        the TIFF field type for this entry

      • getCount

        public long getCount()
        Returns:
        the number of values represented by this entry

      • getOffset

        public long getOffset()
        Returns:
        the absolute file offset or the immediate value for this entry

      • getByteArray

        public byte[] getByteArray()
        Returns:
        this entry's raw byte array, or null if not set

      • getByteLength

        public long getByteLength()
        Returns:
        the total byte length of the data based on type and count

      • getData

        public java.lang.Object getData()
        Returns:
        the parsed data object, or null if no value is available

      • isArray

        public boolean isArray()
        Returns:
        true if the parsed data is an array type

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Generates a human-readable summary of the entry, suitable for logging or metadata inspection. Includes the tag name, numeric ID, field type, and a formatted representation of the value.
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        a multi-line formatted string

        Overrides:
